In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] was embroiled in a '''revolt''' against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces stationed there.

==Background==
Some time prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], control of [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] and most of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] within its borders had fallen to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="SS">''[[Slave Ship]]''</ref> However Tatooine was still under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control.<ref name="TDFS3" />

==The battle==
After long years of occupation and harassment, the population, aided in large part by the exposure of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|death]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] by the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="ROTJ" />

During the battle, [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sariss]], who had worked for the local Imperial Governor, [[Tour Aryon]], for many years, now saw an opportunity to leave her menial job by "disappearing" in the upheaval and link up with her master, [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], elsewhere.<ref name="TDFS3" />

When the uprising erupted, Imperial [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Eugene Talmont|Talmont]] attempted to escape [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] as soon as possible. While he was crossing the city to reach his shuttle in [[Docking Bay 87 (Mos Eisley)|Docking Bay 87]], Talmont and his escort of [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtroopers]] were attacked by the [[Tatooine militia|Mos Eisley Militia]] and by [[Swang's Swoopers]]. The Militia wanted to capture the Prefect to judge him for his crimes. The swoopers just wanted to kill as many Imperials and militiamen as possible.<ref name="ALitS" />
